MHI Overall Organic Traffic Dashboard

Final layout: priority tables first, blog and non-blog separated without overlap, clean paths, 13-month trend visuals, page-group summaries with All Blogs, and a separate topic explorer with month-level growth/drop and May 2026 forecast.

Top Filters

Trend buckets are mutually exclusive. May 2026 actuals are partial; run rate is shown separately for count metrics and not used as the only trend naming basis.

Priority Optimization View

Priority rows appear first. Each month cell includes all four metrics: New Users, Sessions, Engaged Sessions, and Average Engagement Time.

Separate Topic Explorer: Growth, Drop & May 2026 Forecast

This section uses its own filters. It shows topic names, not URLs. For May 2026, the forecast uses actual / 19 × 31 for count metrics.

Blog Topic Areas: Detailed View

Clean topic names only. This section summarizes what is growing or needs watch without showing individual URL strings.

Dashboard generated from uploaded MHI overall organic reports. Technical-looking URLs with traffic are retained to avoid under-reporting.
